theory.intro: Integers are the positive whole numbers, the negative whole numbers, and zero. On a number line they sit in order, evenly spaced.
facts: Negative integers are to the **left** of zero; positive integers to the **right**.
Each interval (gap) on a number line is the **same size** — read the scale first.
steps: Find zero and read the size of one interval.
Left of zero → negative; right of zero → positive.
